description_long: This is a solid dumbbell with two large, hexagonal end caps connected by a straight cylindrical handle. The end caps are textured and display the number '20' in white, indicating the weight in pounds. The surface appears to be coated in a dark, matte material, likely cast iron with a rough finish for grip. The handle is slightly thinner than the end caps and has a consistent, unadorned texture. The hexagonal shape of the end caps prevents the dumbbell from rolling when placed on the ground. There are no visible brand logos, and the dumbbell appears to be in excellent, unused condition.
description: A dark, hexagonal dumbbell with white '20' markings and a textured, matte finish. The handle is cylindrical and unadorned, connecting two large, flat-faced end caps.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the hexagonal end caps and the '20' marking on the upper face.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both '20' markings on the end caps and the full length of the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view similar to view 0, highlighting the hexagonal geometry and the underside of the end caps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the handle and the plain faces of the end caps without visible markings.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, round cross-section, matte and slightly rough texture, no visible ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced end caps made of cast iron with a rough, matte finish and white weight markings.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight markings are visible on the end caps, printed in white as '20'.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
